request_text:
# Autoloop Task: Improve Orientation and Motion Compatibility in SkyLensServerless

## Scope
Apply all implementation work only within the `SkyLensServerless/` app.

## Source of truth
Use `SkyLensServerless/ImproveOrientarionAndMotion.md` as the single source of truth.

## Execution requirements
- Execute iterative pairs in this exact set: `plan,implement,test`.
- Enable full auto answers.
- Do not set `max_iterations`.
- Continue until the task is complete and tests/checks pass (or failures are fully diagnosed with actionable output).
- Do not manually implement changes outside autoloop.

## Deliverables
- Code updates under `SkyLensServerless/` implementing the orientation/motion refactor defined in the source task.
- Updated/added tests needed for the new behavior.
- Verification output from the `test` phase.
